intent: Build a responsive e-commerce platform allowing users to browse products by category, manage a shopping cart, view and write reviews, and complete secure purchases using Stripe payment integration.

entities.name: Web Client
entities.description: A responsive frontend application allowing users to browse categories, view products, manage carts, submit reviews, and proceed to checkout across mobile and desktop devices.

entities.name: Authentication Service
entities.description: Handles user registration, login, and session management, ensuring only authenticated users can check out or write reviews.

entities.name: Product & Catalog Service
entities.description: Manages categories, products, and inventory. Serves product information to users and provides an administrative interface for managers.

entities.name: Shopping Cart Service
entities.description: Maintains persistent state of selected products for both guest and authenticated users before checkout.

entities.name: Order & Checkout Service
entities.description: Processes purchases, orchestrates inventory updates, creates permanent order records, and coordinates with the payment gateway.

entities.name: Stripe Payment Gateway
entities.description: An external integration handling secure credit card transactions and returning payment confirmation tokens to the Order Service.

entities.name: Review & Rating Service
entities.description: Enables authenticated users to submit reviews and star ratings for products, which are then displayed on product detail pages.

architecture.description: The user interacts with the responsive Web Client to browse products categorized by the Catalog Service. To make a purchase or write a review, the user must authenticate via the Authentication Service. Items are saved in the Shopping Cart Service. During checkout, the Order Service calculates the total and initiates a payment transaction through the Stripe Payment Gateway. Upon successful payment confirmation, the Order Service finalizes the transaction, deducts stock via the Catalog Service, and saves the order. Admins utilize a dedicated portal in the Catalog Service to manage inventory and product details.

validation_rules: email must be a valid email format
email must be unique
password must be at least 8 characters long
role must be either 'customer' or 'admin'

endpoints.summary: Authenticate user and return a session token
validation_rules: email must be a valid email format
password is required

endpoints.summary: Retrieve list of all product categories
Retrieve products with optional category filtering
validation_rules: category_id must be an integer if provided
page must be a positive integer if provided

endpoints.summary: Retrieve details of a specific product by ID
validation_rules: id must be a valid integer
name is required and must be a string
price must be a positive floating-point number
stock_quantity must be a non-negative integer
category_id must match an existing category ID

endpoints.summary: Retrieve current shopping cart items for guest or authenticated user
validation_rules: session_token is required for guest checkout if user is not authenticated

endpoints.summary: Add a product item to the shopping cart
validation_rules: product_id must match a valid active product
quantity must be a positive integer

endpoints.summary: Update quantity of a specific cart item
validation_rules: id must be a valid cart item ID
quantity must be a positive integer

endpoints.summary: Remove an item from the shopping cart
validation_rules: id must be a valid cart item ID

endpoints.summary: Submit order checkout and process payment via Stripe token
validation_rules: cart_id must refer to a valid and populated cart matching the user
stripe_payment_token must be a valid payment representation string

endpoints.summary: Retrieve user ratings and reviews for a product
validation_rules: id must be a valid product ID

endpoints.summary: Submit a rating and review for a product
validation_rules: id must be a valid product ID
rating must be an integer between 1 and 5
comment must not exceed 1000 characters

rules.logic: Upon successful payment confirmation from Stripe Payment Gateway, Order & Checkout Service calls Product & Catalog Service to decrement stock. If stock goes below zero, order fails and payment is refunded.
triggers: Stripe Payment Gateway returns success token

rules.logic: Review & Rating Service validates with Authentication Service that the user is logged in, and queries Order & Checkout Service to ensure the user has completed an order containing the product being reviewed.
triggers: Review & Rating Service receives review request

rules.logic: Upon successful login, Shopping Cart Service fetches the guest cart items associated with the session ID and merges them with the user's authenticated cart, summing quantities for identical items.
triggers: Authentication Service issues a valid login token
Web Client transitions from guest to authenticated state

rules.logic: Order & Checkout Service must fetch current prices directly from Product & Catalog Service and recalculate the total order amount, rather than relying on the price sent from the Web Client.
triggers: Payment request sent to Stripe Payment Gateway
